chosen_logo.why: Header SVG 'P_G_Logo_RGB.svg' (50×50, alt='Go to Procter & Gamble homepage') from the annual report. This is the canonical P&G monogram (blue moon-and-stars circular badge with 'P&G' wordmark) — visible in every page screenshot's header. Vector, currentColor-flippable, square viewBox. Strongest evidence-backed pick.

brand_primary.name: --primary
brand_primary.evidence: Computed nav color, h2 color, footer bg, button color across all 8 pages; 115 hits in color-frequency, 2nd only to white. The P&G Blue.

brand_secondary.name: --accent
brand_secondary.evidence: Cyan accent on Annual Report hero (the giant clover graphic) and Brands page; 6 hits across annualreport2025+brands. Acts as the lighter chord of the blue family.

ink.name: --ink
ink.evidence: Body text near-black; raised slightly toward navy from pure #000 (107 hits) to harmonise with brand-primary blue and avoid the AI-slop pure-black flatness.

paper.name: --surface
paper.evidence: Default page background, 150 hits, all pages.

accents.name: --tint
accents.evidence: Light-blue surface variant; 23 hits across innovation/citizenship/pg-history/who-we-are. The P&G hero-section pale background.

accents.name: --warn
accents.evidence: Innovation page accent (Innovation_Orange.svg + 3 color-frequency hits on innovation). Codifies the section-color system.

accents.name: --green
accents.evidence: Sustainability page accent (3 color-frequency hits on environmental-sustainability). The eco/nature accent of the section system.

accents.name: --teal
accents.evidence: Deep ocean blue from sustainability palette (3 hits). Reinforces water/nature semantic.

display_font.evidence: fonts.frequencies count 67 (highest non-fallback); computed_heading h1/h2/h3 across all 8 pages all use Montserrat. Used at 75-96px / weight 700 for heroes.

body_font.evidence: Montserrat is the universal UI face on this site (header, nav, button, h1-h3 all use it); the recon's body-element 'Times' is just default UA serif on bare <body> not actual content. Real rendered body copy uses Montserrat.

mono_font.evidence: no monospace usage detected; pick a system stack as a fallback for any code/numeric tabular data in slides.

spacing_radius_shadow.evidence: Buttons/h1/h2/main all radius 0px across every surface. Shadow 'none' everywhere. main padY 66px, footer padY 50px — generous vertical breathing room. The exception is link-pill <a> at radius 50px (the rounded CTA pill), which is a deliberate component-level call-out, not a global radius. Capture both: sharp default, pill for primary CTAs.

aesthetic.voice_register: formal corporate, civic-aspirational; first-person plural ('we'); declares values plainly without slogans
